The Ultimate Restaurant POS & Kitchen Manager.

Streamline Kitchen Order Tickets (KOTs), Table Bookings, and Split Bills instantly. Manage raw ingredients and spoilage with precision, all with 100% offline reliability.

Designed for the Food Industry

🔥 KOT Automation

Send orders directly from the table to the kitchen display screen instantly. Never lose a ticket again.

💸 Split Billing

Easily split a single bill across multiple patrons or payment methods with just two taps.

📦 Recipe Management

Track raw ingredients, control portion sizes, and log daily spoilage to prevent margin leaks.
